Interface OpenApi3xSchema

All Superinterfaces:
BooleanSchemaUnion, Node, OpenApiSchema, Schema, Union, Visitable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi30Schema, OpenApi31Schema, OpenApi32Schema
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi30SchemaImpl, OpenApi31SchemaImpl, OpenApi32SchemaImpl
public interface OpenApi3xSchema extends OpenApiSchema
